headline: Incyte (INCY) Wins EU Backing For Opzelura As Pipeline Data Builds Across Four Drugs
summary: Incyte (NasdaqGS: INCY) reported a favorable CHMP opinion for Opzelura in Europe for atopic dermatitis. The company released pivotal Phase 2 data for zilurgisertib in ultra rare fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva. Phase 1 results for INCA033989 in mutCALR mutant myeloproliferative neoplasms showed strong clinical activity. Phase 3 frontMIND data for tafasitamab in first-line aggressive lymphomas indicated robust efficacy outcomes. For investors tracking Incyte, these updates highlight...
